retry_reason: The put operation itself is unconditional when executed; failure to call the function is due to conditions that may be retried, but this is not a refcount wrapper.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is resource deletion (state checks, notification, list removal, thread stopping) with a final put as one step; not primarily refcount management.
